name: Orange Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange chicken in a shallow baking pan, breast side up, without overlapping.
2. Sprinkle the chicken with onion and seasonings.
3. Blend flour with 1/2 cup of orange juice.
4. Stir in the remaining orange juice and pour over the chicken.
5. Bake, uncovered, basting occasionally at 350°F for 1 hour or until tender.
6. Serve the chicken over noodles or rice on a warm platter. Stir the pan juices to blend and pour over the chicken.
